lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਜਿ ਅਗਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau bisarai ji agan meh raakhai |
lines.english: Why forget Him, who preserves us in the fire of the womb?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau bisarai jin sabh kichh deea |
lines.english: Why forget Him, who has given us everything?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਜਿ ਜੀਵਨ ਜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau bisarai ji jeevan jeea |
lines.english: Why forget Him, who is the Life of the living beings?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਜਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਤੇ ਕਾਢੈ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau bisarai ji bikh te kaadtai |
lines.english: Why forget Him, who lifts us up out of corruption?
By Guru's Grace, rare is the one who realizes this.
Those separated from Him for countless lifetimes, are re-united with Him once again.
O friends, O Saints, make this your work.
Through the Perfect Guru, this essential reality is understood.
O Nanak, God's humble servants meditate on Him. ||4||
Renounce everything else, and chant the Name of the Lord.
Chant the Naam yourself, and inspire others to chant it.
Meditate, meditate, meditate in remembrance of Him, and find peace.
All joys and comforts are in the treasure of the Naam.
By loving devotional worship, you shall cross over the world-ocean.
Without devotional meditation, the body will be just ashes.
All sorrows shall vanish.
Even the drowning can reach the place of rest and safety.
O Nanak, chant the Naam, the treasure of excellence. ||5||
Love and affection, and the taste of yearning, have welled up within;
beholding with my eyes His Blessed Vision, I am at peace.
My mind blossoms forth in ecstasy, washing the feet of the Holy.
within my mind and body, this is my purpose:
Show Your mercy - please, grant me this one request:
Rare is the one who obtains their company.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kai man tan rang |
lines.english: The minds and bodies of His devotees are infused with His Love.
O Nanak, He is contained among all. ||6||
God, the Forgiving Lord, is kind to the poor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee upamaa kahee na jaae |
lines.english: His Praises cannot be spoken;
by Guru's Grace, may I chant the Naam.
The Patron of the patronless, the Lord of the Universe, the Sustainer of the world,
He loves His devotees, and He is always merciful to them.
the Nourisher of all beings.
The Primal Being, the Creator of the Creation.
The Support of the breath of life of His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਜਪੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਪੁਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo japai su hoe puneet |
lines.english: Whoever meditates on Him is sanctified,
Nanak has entered Your Sanctuary, O Supreme Lord God. ||7||
I am unworthy, lowly and ignorant.
focusing the mind in loving devotional worship.
Everything is obtained: the heavens, liberation and deliverance,

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ek nimakh har ke gun gaae |
lines.english: if one sings the Lord's Glories, even for an instant.
So many realms of power, pleasures and great glories,
Abundant foods, clothes and music
His actions are good, he is glorious and wealthy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਕਥਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam kee kathaa man bhaaee |
lines.english: come to one whose mind is pleased with the Sermon of the Lord's Name.
come to one whose tongue continually chants the Lord's Name, Har, Har.
All pleasures, O Nanak, are so revealed. ||8||20||
the Mantra of the Perfect Guru dwells within his heart.
O God, grant me a home in the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਕੀਆ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਜਾਪਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aapan keea naanakaa aape hee fir jaap |1|
lines.english: Through His Creation, O Nanak, He meditates on Himself. ||1||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਗੁਨ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਸੁੰਨ ਸਮਾਧੀ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: saragun niragun nirankaar sun samaadhee aap |
lines.english: He possesses all qualities; He transcends all qualities; He is the Formless Lord. He Himself is in Primal Samaadhi.
Ashtapadee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਅਕਾਰੁ ਇਹੁ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੇਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jab akaar ihu kachh na drisattetaa |
lines.english: When this world had not yet appeared in any form,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪ ਪੁੰਨ ਤਬ ਕਹ ਤੇ ਹੋਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: paap pun tab keh te hotaa |
lines.english: who then committed sins and performed good deeds?
When the Lord Himself was in Profound Samaadhi,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਇਸ ਕਾ ਬਰਨੁ ਚਿਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਪਤ ॥
lines.translit: jab is kaa baran chihan na jaapat |
lines.english: When there was no color or shape to be seen,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਬੈਰ ਬਿਰੋਧ ਕਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਮਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: tab bair birodh kis sang kamaat |
lines.english: then against whom were hate and jealousy directed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਸਹਿ ਬਿਆਪਤ ॥
lines.translit: tab harakh sog kahu kiseh biaapat |
lines.english: then who experienced joy and sorrow?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਮੋਹ ਕਹਾ ਕਿਸੁ ਹੋਵਤ ਭਰਮ ॥
lines.translit: tab moh kahaa kis hovat bharam |
lines.english: then where was emotional attachment, and who had doubts?
When the Supreme Lord Himself was Himself All-in-all,
